title: ceratanthus longicornis
intro: Ceratanthus longicornis, also known as the 'long-horned ceratanthus', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for conditions like fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of Ceratanthus longicornis are prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
